seo.title: #mbf Program Overview: Start Your Journey Here
seo.description: Ignite your metabolism and burn fat with #mbf. See what the program includes, any equipment needed, and meet your trainer here.

trainers.bioBodi: Megan Davies is an NSCA certified personal trainer and creator of #mbf® Muscle Burns Fat® and #mbfa® Muscle Burns Fat Advanced® on Beachbody On Demand. Known for her straightforward workout style and upbeat personality, Megan knows what it takes to get you in the best shape of your life. Take one of her live BODi classes today!

data.descriptionShort: Build muscle and burn fat with daily strength-training and cardio workouts.
data.descriptionLong: Get leaner, get stronger, get healthier as you ignite your metabolism and incinerate fat. For three weeks, you'll follow weightlifting and cardio workouts that are set to the music beat, so you know the intensity you’ll need to get maximum results.

modules.equipment: Dumbbells, BOD Rope, Core Comfort Mat*
modules.categories: Weight Loss, Strength, Muscle Building, Cardio

modules.title: Is #mbf Right for Me?
modules.content: People often think cardio and crash dieting is the magic formula for losing weight. Super Trainer Megan Davies has a better idea. This 3-week program can help you build muscle, burn fat, and turn your body into a calorie-scorching machine to make sure you’re ready and strong for the hard work and bigger challenges in #mbfa.

modules.title: What Are the Workouts Like?
modules.content: To help you to get lean, strong and healthy, Megan leads you through a 25-35 minute strength-training or cardio workout every day for 3 weeks. Ideally, you’ll start on a Monday and commit to her schedule. Sundays feature a recovery workout to get you ready for the next week.

modules.title: Tools and Equipment
modules.content: Read the #mbf Get Started Guide to prepare for the program and download the Workout Calendar to see your day’s workout and track your progress. The Beachbody Guide to Nutrition and accompanying Introduction to Nutrition videos will show you how to eat to optimize your results. You’ll need a set of light, medium and heavy dumbbells, a mat, and the BOD Rope, the Cordless Indoor Jump Rope.

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

trainers.bio: Megan Davies is an NSCA certified personal trainer and creator of #mbf® Muscle Burns Fat® and #mbfa® Muscle Burns Fat Advanced® on Beachbody On Demand. Known for her straightforward workout style and upbeat personality, Megan knows what it takes to get you in the best shape of your life. Take one of her live BODi classes today!

modules.title: Nicole P. Lost 32 lbs. and 21 in. doing  #mbf and #mbfa.
modules.testimonial: You will not regret this program. I have tried many programs before, only to get little to no results. #mbf and #mbfa get you the results you've always wanted!
modules.disclaimer: Results achieved in 12 weeks using #mbf and #mbfa with Shakeology and Beachbody Performance supplements.

A3jSdym3jf5hqTWanxQa29.title: #mbf Sample Workout
A3jSdym3jf5hqTWanxQa29.descriptionLong: Stay on beat in this full-body strength and cardio workout that proves you can build muscle and torch fat in just 30 minutes a day.

trainers.bio: Super Trainer Megan Davies is an NSCA certified personal trainer and creator of #mbf Muscle Burns Fat, #mbfa Muscle Burns Fat Advanced, and Sure Thing. After appearing on BODi’s fitness reality show, THE 20s, Megan became the next Super Trainer and created Clean Week. Her passion for learning about physiology, health, fitness, and technique fuels every program she creates. Her down-to-earth, empowering workout style and upbeat personality make you feel like you’re training with a best friend.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvMobq4.title: LIIFT4
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvMobq4.description: Build muscle and burn calories with classic weightlifting and HIIT cardio.
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvMobq4.descriptionShort: Build muscle and burn calories with classic weightlifting and HIIT cardio.
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvMobq4.descriptionLong: LIIFT4 combines heavy lifting and intense cardio to transform your body in 4 days a week. And with 32 unique, real-time workouts, you’ll never get bored, because you’ll never do the same one twice.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvNVfyi.title: Getting Started with #mbf & #mbfa
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvNVfyi.descriptionLong: Watch this video to learn everything you need to start #mbf and #mbfa. You'll get an overview of the program, the equipment you need, and how dialing-in your nutrition and using BODi Performance supplements can help you build the body you've always wanted.
